license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dyt7wm
title: CTAB mix
author: Andrew Baker

steps_raw.instruction: Dissolve 0.75 g CTAB in ~ 20 mL MilliQ water undetermined Cetyltrimethylammonium bromide Contributed by users
Add 12.5 mL of 4 M NaCl Sodium chloride P212121
Add 75 µL of E. coli tRNA at 20 mg/mL E. coli tRNA is used as a carrier nucleic acid to boost total nucleic acid concentrations and increase the extraction yield
Make up to a final volume of 50 mL with MilliQ water MilliQ water Contributed by users
